name: Valentine’s Day
description: The day of love celebrated in February.

name: Semana Blanca (White Week)
description: An increasingly popular week-long celebration in Spain.

name: Carnival of Santa Cruz de Tenerife
description: Considered the second most important carnival in the world after Rio de Janeiro, featuring the Carnival's Queen Election Great Gala.

name: Carnival of Cadiz
description: One of the most legendary carnivals in Spain, known for its Official Contest of Carnival Groups and satirical musical performances.

name: Carnival of Vinaroz
description: A Mediterranean carnival featuring the Gala de las reinas, theme nights like pajama night, and a paellas day.

name: Carnival of Laza
description: Considered the oldest carnival in Galicia, featuring the peliqueiros parade and the farracada mud-stained rag battle.

name: Carnival of Verin
description: One of the three villages forming the magic triangle of the Entroido in Galicia.

name: Carnival of Xinzo de Lima
description: One of the three villages forming the magic triangle of the Entroido in Galicia.

name: Carnival of Las Palmas
description: An artistic carnival featuring the Gala Drag Queen, the Canine Carnival, and a body make-up contest.

name: Carnival of Aguilas
description: An authentic carnival declared an International Tourist Interest Festivity, known for its drink 'La Cuerva' and paper-costume contests.

name: Carnival of Badajoz
description: A musical carnival known for having the best troupes in Spain and the Fiesta de las Candelas commencement event.

name: Carnival of Tolosa
description: The most popular carnival in the Basque Country.

name: Carnival of Sitges
description: Described as the most fun and festive carnival with an agenda full of day celebrations and diverse night events.

name: Haro Wine Carnival
description: A carnival in the La Rioja region described as the most enticing for wine lovers.
